name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Official Approval Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
This will just take two seconds. |
---
| | |

Peter,

The President has asked us to reach out to some of our top supporters for a one-question poll, and as one of our best, you've been chosen to participate.

**Please take a moment to choose one of the options below to answer the following:**

The President's job performance has been...
**[GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=173f948867372404dd6401bb481b5ed40980bf6af823c8b350a248bb1f95beb2e183718b5d2382bd889d86b0bb2fc408)** **[GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=173f948867372404f6f745ff1ac092bed6094eba4b3cc5637a6c60f381457056faf263d0545323712e07135045ca7fbf)** **[OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=173f94886737240410bbe00ec4d00b751253b4a29880990f38c6c5303649aa80f95cc5a3a97465312ac19fe28c9856fe)** **[OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=173f9488673724041c3765b8d930216ea4cc2ce9d6bd6a25e2fe31aff8bfc4b69e158434ec38f1ecd7332e8bd1a656a4)**
Thank you for your input, Peter.

**We 'll be sure to pass it along to President Trump.**

Presidential Polling
Team Trump

name: DWS
subject: things are heating up 🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| "Since record-keeping began in 1896 it's the hottest of any month on record ... So far 2017 -- from January through July -- has also been the warmest calendar year on record for Miami."
_\- The Sun Sentinel_ , 8/01/17 Friend, It's time to stop pretending climate change is some far off, distant threat. We are feeling (quite literally) the effects of climate change right here, right now. Icebergs the size of U.S. states are breaking off of Antarctica. Summers are becoming hotter than they've been in more than a century. **Studies indicate that South Florida will be hit especially hard by the effects of climate change.** Rising sea-levels could destroy our infrastructure and contaminate our local water supplies. Miami is expected to be hit harder than any other city in the country -- more than two million Miami residents may have to flee the city before 2100 as a result of a surging sea-levels and increasingly more destructive storm systems. We can't wait on the President or Republicans to finally come to grips with reality. **The climate is changing before their eyes, and they continue to blind themselves with denial and ignorance.** Droughts will worsen, fires will intensify, and the damage to our economy and public health will only get worse with time. [_**Climate change is real and requires immediate action. Demand President Trump and Republicans in Congress take climate change seriously by taking real action to address it.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e29/622b7b5b/555b72c/307bdba1/3859276232/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170816") Thank you, Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e29/622b7b5b/555b72c/307bdba0/3859276232/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Confederate monuments
body:
#
Team --
This morning, I joined Joy Reid on MSNBC's AM Joy to discuss Confederate monuments, and particularly the one in Tallahassee. Just a few days ago, we called on Governor Rick Scott to remove that monument from the Old Florida Capitol immediately, and have been met with a disappointing silence. My leading GOP opponent Adam Putnam claimed he didn't know about the monument - what a luxurious place to be.
Growing up in the South, I am well aware of our complicated history with race and the Civil War. There isn't a day that I don't drive behind a car with a Confederate flag. Confederate monuments dot the lawns of our Courthouses, town centers, and even the grounds of the Florida Capitol.
[**Watch my interview on AMJoy this morning, and then stand with our campaign to bring moral leadership to the state of Florida:**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32a3/9e00690/4ce55adc/2403686c/1844188531/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017-amjoy?refcode=em170820-video")
[****](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32a3/9e00690/4ce55adc/2403686c/1844188531/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017-amjoy?refcode=em170820-video")
Because of how common our encounters are with these symbols, many of us have had to convince ourselves that they don't matter. We tell ourselves that a flag or a statute, regardless of how demeaning in its display, can't harm us or keep us from reaching our life goals.
Our fear is that if we pause long enough to internalize their message, maybe we'd grow hopelessly frustrated by our seeming inability to change things.
But Charlottesville changed things -- these "harmless" symbols have been weaponized and an innocent life was lost pushing back against Neo-Nazis and racists who have rallied around these vestiges of the the Confederacy.
I don't know about you, but this is not the battle I imagine for my children or yours. Let's put these symbols where they belong - in history. Let's never forget what happened and commit to never allow it to happen again.
[**Watch the interview from AMJoy this morning, and join our campaign for moral leadership in Florida >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32a3/9e00690/4ce55adc/2403686c/1844188531/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017-amjoy?refcode=em170820-video")
Onward,
Andrew

**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32a3/9e00690/4ce55adc/2403686c/1844188531/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017-amjoy?refcode=em170820-video")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32a3/9e00690/4ce55adc/2403686f/1844188531/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32a3/9e00690/4ce55adc/2403686e/1844188531/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32a3/9e00690/4ce55adc/24036861/1844188531/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: Team Ryan
subject: It's not just taxes -- here's what else you're paying for:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
It's true, Friend.

**Even though Americans are paying more in taxes than ever before, the bill for regulations is _still higher._
**

**Here 's the thing: **Not only do you pay out the nose for taxes, but you're also paying for these burdensome regulations that drain your wallet and our economy by making it impossible for small businesses to compete.

**Bottom line: our country is drowning under this regulatory burden.**

That's why your House Republicans are working to roll-back regulations and remove the red tape blocking our country's path to prosperity.

But the Democrats are clinging relentlessly to these last remnants of the Obama administration, [**which is why we need you to sign on to support House Republicans.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzAyNDUzMzAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjE1NDc4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[**Add your name >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzAyNDUzMzAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjE1NDc4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you for your time,

Team Ryan

| [Add your name](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzAyNDUzMzAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjE1NDc4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=30245330&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjE1NDc4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

name: ANNOUNCEMENT@dscc.org
subject: Don't miss this giveaway (Franken)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Al Franken knows our best hope of stopping the Trump agenda is for us to organize in support of our Democratic senators.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-book-contest?refcode=DPE-20170820-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

Al Franken knows our best hope of stopping the Trump agenda is for us to organize in support of our Democratic senators.

That's why, for a limited time, when you make a contribution to the DSCC to elect Senate Democrats, you'll be automatically entered to win a signed copy of Senator Franken's new book, _Al Franken, Giant of the Senate_!

[**Chip in $1 to support Democrats right now -- and be automatically entered to win Al Franken 's new book.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-book-contest?refcode=DPE-20170820-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-book-contest?refcode=DPE-20170820-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Senator Franken is leading the resistance against Trump, asking tough questions to get answers the American people deserve -- who can forget when he schooled Betsy DeVos on the difference between proficiency and growth? Or when he grilled Jeff Sessions on his record working on civil rights?

Since Trump took office, Senator Franken has been on the frontlines fighting for our progressive values.

So for DSCC members who are in the fight with him, when you make a contribution right now, you'll automatically be entered to win a copy of his book -- _personally signed by Al Franken_ \-- and you'll do your part to stand with Senate Democrats in opposing Trump and the GOP's harmful agenda.

**Chip in $1 to show you 're standing with our Senate Democrats -- and be automatically entered to win a signed copy of Al Franken's new memoir:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/win-al-frankens-book**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-book-contest?refcode=DPE-20170820-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win, and will not improve chances of winning.

Void where prohibited by law. Entries must be received by August 25, 2017. You may enter by contributing to Sponsor at **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/franken-book-contest](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d934/2b07114c/350cf92/7313a87e/1130258793/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/franken-book-contest")** or at **[https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/al-franken-book-contest](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d934/2b07114c/350cf92/7313a879/1130258793/VEsA/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/al-franken-book-contest")** to enter without contributing. Ten (10) winners will receive the following prize: one (1) hardcover edition of the book _"Al Franken, Giant of the Senate"_ autographed by Senator Al Franken (approximate retail value of prize: $28.00). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes will be awarded. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the U.S. or Puerto Rico and 18 or older. PROMOTION SUBJECT TO OFFICIAL RULES and additional restrictions on eligibility, available at [http://action.dscc.org/page/content/al-franken-book-contest-rules/](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d934/2b07114c/350cf92/7313a878/1130258793/VEsB/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/content/al-franken-book-contest-rules/"). Sponsor is DSCC, Inc., 120 Maryland Ave. NE, Washington, DC 20002.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d934/2b07114c/350cf92/7313a87b/1130258793/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d934/2b07114c/350cf92/7313a87a/1130258793/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d934/2b07114c/350cf92/7313a875/1130258793/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

That's why, for a limited time, when you make a contribution to the DSCC to elect Senate Democrats, you'll be automatically entered to win a signed copy of Senator Franken's new book, Al Franken, Giant of the Senate! "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Senator Franken is leading the resistance against Trump, asking tough questions to get answers the American people deserve -- who can forget when he schooled Betsy DeVos on the difference between proficiency and growth? Or when he grilled Jeff Sessions on his record working on civil rights? Since Trump took office, Senator Franken has been on the frontlines fighting for our progressive values. So for DSCC members who are in the fight with him, when you make a contribution right now, you'll automatically be entered to win a copy of his book -- personally signed by Al Franken \-- and you'll do your part to stand with Senate Democrats in opposing Trump and the GOP's harmful agenda. Chip in $1 to show you 're standing with our Senate Democrats -- and be automatically entered to win a signed copy of Al Franken's new memoir: "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Thank you, Team DSCC Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited by law. Entries must be received by August 25, 2017. You may enter by contributing to Sponsor at "" or at "" to enter without contributing. Ten (10) winners will receive the following prize: one (1) hardcover edition of the book "Al Franken, Giant of the Senate" autographed by Senator Al Franken (approximate retail value of prize: $28.00). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes will be awarded. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the U.S. or Puerto Rico and 18 or older. PROMOTION SUBJECT TO OFFICIAL RULES and additional restrictions on eligibility, available at "". Sponsor is DSCC, Inc., 120 Maryland Ave. NE, Washington, DC 20002. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, "". If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
